title: 7 Best Constant Contact Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Compare top Constant Contact alternatives. Find the best email marketing tool for your business with our detailed comparison.
intro: While Constant Contact offers solid email marketing features, alternatives may provide better value, superior user experience, or specialized features for your specific needs. Whether you're looking for a free tier, advanced automation, or industry-specific tools, there's likely a better fit for your business.
why_switch: Many alternatives offer free tiers with generous subscriber limits, letting you start at $0 instead of $12/month
Competitors like MailerLite and Beehiiv have significantly higher user satisfaction ratings on review platforms
Specialized platforms like ConvertKit and Klaviyo offer better automation and features tailored to creators and e-commerce businesses

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: Small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite starts at just $9/month with a free tier supporting 1,000 subscribers, making it the most affordable option for growing businesses. It offers drag-and-drop editing, automation, and landing pages—matching Constant Contact's core features at a lower price point.

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv excels at newsletter monetization with built-in ad networks and referral programs, unlike Constant Contact. With a 4.7 G2 rating and 4.4 Trustpilot score, it's ideal if you want to generate revenue from your subscriber list.

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit's visual automation builder and subscriber tagging system are purpose-built for creators managing complex workflows. It includes commerce features and sequences that make it easier to sell digital products than Constant Contact.

alternatives.name: Mailchimp
alternatives.key_difference: Mailchimp's free tier supports 500 subscribers at no cost, making it perfect for testing email marketing before spending money. It includes A/B testing, audience segmentation, and automation without requiring a paid plan.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: Businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign combines email marketing with a full CRM, lead scoring, and site tracking in one platform—going far beyond Constant Contact's capabilities. It's ideal for sales-focused businesses that need deep customer relationship management.

alternatives.name: Klaviyo
alternatives.tagline: The platform for intelligent marketing automation
alternatives.best_for: E-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce
alternatives.key_difference: Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce with native Shopify integration, predictive analytics, and review collection tools. If you're selling products online, Klaviyo's specialized features outperform Constant Contact's general e-commerce capabilities.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo offers an exceptionally generous free tier with 100,000 emails/month and includes SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat alongside email. It's the most feature-rich free option and best for businesses wanting omnichannel communication beyond email.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to Constant Contact?
faq.a: Brevo offers the most generous free tier with 100,000 emails per month and includes SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat. Mailchimp and MailerLite also provide solid free options with 500 and 1,000 subscriber limits respectively, making them ideal starting points for budget-conscious users.

faq.q: What is the best Constant Contact alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite combines affordability ($9/month to start), ease of use, and strong customer satisfaction (4.5 Trustpilot rating). It provides drag-and-drop templates, automation, and landing pages without overwhelming small business owners with unnecessary complexity.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to Constant Contact?
faq.a: Yes, MailerLite starts at $9/month—$3 less than Constant Contact. Better yet, Mailchimp, Brevo, ConvertKit, and Beehiiv all offer free plans that cost nothing, allowing you to test features before committing to a paid plan.
